project.name: SizeWise HVAC Canvas
project.description: A professional HVAC duct sizing and design application built with Next.js and Tauri. Provides an interactive 2D/3D canvas for drawing duct runs, rooms, fittings, and equipment, with real-time engineering calculations (pressure drop, velocity, auto-sizing), BOM generation, and multi-format export.

nodes.name: layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Root Next.js layout. Wraps the entire app with AppShell (menu bar + platform chrome) and global providers. Entry point for all routes.

nodes.name: canvas/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Next.js route for the main canvas designer. Renders CanvasPageWrapper which handles project loading state before mounting CanvasPage.

nodes.name: dashboard/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Next.js route for the project dashboard. Lists recent and all projects, supports create/open/delete/search operations.

nodes.name: CanvasPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Central canvas orchestrator. Composes the full canvas workspace: left/right sidebars, toolbar, inspector, viewport, status bar, and all canvas tools. Owns the primary canvas interaction loop.

nodes.name: CanvasContainer.tsx
nodes.summary: Konva Stage wrapper. Manages the 2D rendering surface, handles mouse/touch events, delegates to the active tool, and coordinates entity rendering layers.

nodes.name: CanvasViewportHost.tsx
nodes.summary: Hosts the canvas viewport, manages viewport transforms (pan/zoom), and bridges between the Konva stage and the viewport Zustand store.

nodes.name: ThreeViewport.tsx
nodes.summary: Three.js 3D viewport component. Renders the HVAC system in 3D using WebGL. Toggled by the view mode control.

nodes.name: InspectorPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Right-sidebar inspector panel. Shows entity-specific properties (duct, fitting, equipment, room) for the current selection. Routes to the appropriate sub-inspector based on entity type.

nodes.name: DuctInspector.tsx
nodes.summary: Inspector sub-panel for duct segments. Displays and allows editing of duct dimensions, material, insulation, velocity, and pressure drop.

nodes.name: DuctRunInspector.tsx
nodes.summary: Inspector for duct run aggregates. Shows totals: static pressure, system CFM, run length, and cost summary for an entire duct run path.

nodes.name: EquipmentInspector.tsx
nodes.summary: Inspector for HVAC equipment (RTUs, AHUs, etc). Displays equipment specs, port connections, and flow assignments.

nodes.name: Toolbar.tsx
nodes.summary: Left-side drawing toolbar. Contains draw mode buttons: Select, Duct, Room, Equipment, Fitting, Note, Support. Activates the corresponding tool in the canvas store.

nodes.name: BOMPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Bill of Materials panel. Displays a data grid of all duct, fitting, and equipment items with quantities and costs. Synced to canvas selection highlighting.

nodes.name: CalculationsPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Engineering calculations summary panel. Aggregates system-level metrics: total static pressure, CFM distribution, velocity profiles, and ASHRAE compliance flags.

nodes.name: Minimap.tsx
nodes.summary: Canvas minimap overlay. Renders a scaled-down view of the full design, shows current viewport position, and supports click-to-navigate.

nodes.name: DuctTool.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive duct drawing tool. Handles click-to-start, drag-to-extend duct runs, snapping to grid and existing endpoints, and auto-connection to equipment ports.

nodes.name: EquipmentTool.ts
nodes.summary: Equipment placement tool. Places HVAC equipment (RTUs, AHUs, VAVs) on the canvas with port markers and connects to adjacent duct runs.

nodes.name: FittingTool.ts
nodes.summary: Fitting insertion tool. Places elbows, wyes, reducers, and other duct fittings at junction points. Auto-detects valid insertion locations.

nodes.name: SelectTool.ts
nodes.summary: Selection tool. Handles single-click selection, drag-marquee multi-select, move operations, and entity resize handles.

nodes.name: RoomTool.ts
nodes.summary: Room drawing tool. Allows users to draw rectangular room boundaries that anchor duct run endpoints and define CFM demand zones.

nodes.name: DuctRenderer.ts
nodes.summary: Konva renderer for duct segments. Draws duct outlines, applies visual state styling (selected, hovered, warning, error), and renders size labels inline.

nodes.name: DuctRunRenderer.ts
nodes.summary: Konva renderer for complete duct run paths. Renders the full run as a connected series of segments with flow direction arrows and system color coding.

nodes.name: FittingRenderer.ts
nodes.summary: Konva renderer for duct fittings (elbows, wyes, reducers, caps). Uses engineering symbols conforming to SMACNA drawing conventions.

nodes.name: EquipmentRenderer.ts
nodes.summary: Konva renderer for HVAC equipment. Draws equipment symbols with port markers, connection indicators, and nameplate overlays.

nodes.name: canvas.store.ts
nodes.summary: Primary Zustand store for the canvas. Owns active tool, draw mode, canvas entities (ducts, fittings, rooms, equipment, notes), and inter-entity connection state.

nodes.name: entityStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for the entity registry. Provides normalized CRUD operations for all canvas entity types. The single source of truth for entity data.

nodes.name: project.store.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for the active project. Holds project metadata, settings, dirty state, and coordinates with persistence layer for save/load.

nodes.name: validationStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for validation state. Holds constraint violations, engineering warnings, and ASHRAE compliance flags across all entities.

nodes.name: viewportStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for viewport state: pan offset, zoom level, visible bounds. Drives the Konva stage transform and minimap position indicator.

nodes.name: selectionStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for selection state. Tracks selected entity IDs, multi-select set, and focus entity. Drives inspector panel and BOM highlight.

nodes.name: engineeringCalculator.ts
nodes.summary: Core HVAC engineering calculator. Implements ASHRAE/SMACNA algorithms: duct friction loss (equal friction method), velocity pressure, fitting loss coefficients (C-values), and system static pressure.

nodes.name: PressurePropagationService.ts
nodes.summary: Propagates static pressure through the duct network graph. Traverses from equipment ports outward, accumulating friction and fitting losses per segment.

nodes.name: FlowPropagationService.ts
nodes.summary: Propagates CFM flow values through the connection graph. Splits flow at branches (wye fittings), sums at merges, and validates balance at equipment ports.

nodes.name: ConnectionGraphBuilder.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the adjacency graph of duct network connections from entity store state. Nodes are entities; edges are physical connections between duct endpoints.

nodes.name: TopologyValidationService.ts
nodes.summary: Validates duct network topology: detects orphan segments, dead ends, missing equipment connections, and loop configurations that violate design rules.

nodes.name: autoSizingService.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-sizing engine. Given a duct run and target CFM, calculates optimal duct dimensions to meet velocity and pressure drop constraints per ASHRAE guidelines.

nodes.name: fittingInsertionService.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-inserts required fittings at duct junctions. Detects elbow, wye, and reducer requirements from geometry and inserts the appropriate fitting type.

nodes.name: bomGenerationService.ts
nodes.summary: Generates the Bill of Materials from entity store. Aggregates duct lengths, fitting counts, equipment items, and insulation. Applies fabrication profile pricing.

nodes.name: costCalculationService.ts
nodes.summary: Calculates material and labor costs from BOM items. Applies fabrication profile unit prices, waste factors, and labor rates.

nodes.name: ProjectStateOrchestrator.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestrates project save/load lifecycle. Coordinates between entity store, project store, and storage adapter. Handles dirty state, auto-save scheduling, and conflict resolution.

nodes.name: StorageAdapter.ts
nodes.summary: Abstract storage interface. Defines read/write/list/delete operations for project files. Implemented by TauriStorageAdapter (desktop), FileSystemAccessAdapter (web), and WebStorageAdapter (browser fallback).

nodes.name: TauriStorageAdapter.ts
nodes.summary: Tauri-native file system adapter. Uses Tauri's FS API for full filesystem access on desktop (Windows/macOS/Linux). Enables native open/save dialogs.

nodes.name: FileSystemAccessAdapter.ts
nodes.summary: Web File System Access API adapter. Provides file read/write for modern browsers using the showOpenFilePicker / showSaveFilePicker APIs.

nodes.name: MigrationRegistry.ts
nodes.summary: Registers and runs schema migration scripts for project file format upgrades. Ensures older saved projects are migrated to the current schema on open.

nodes.name: duct.schema.ts
nodes.summary: Zod schema for duct segment entities. Defines the shape of a duct: start/end points, width, height, shape (rectangular/round), material, insulation, and calculation results.

nodes.name: duct-run.schema.ts
nodes.summary: Zod schema for duct run aggregates. Defines a logical duct run: ordered list of duct segments, associated fittings, system service, and aggregate calculation state.

nodes.name: equipment.schema.ts
nodes.summary: Zod schema for HVAC equipment entities. Defines equipment type, position, dimensions, port definitions, and capacity specifications.

nodes.name: fitting.schema.ts
nodes.summary: Zod schema for duct fitting entities. Defines fitting type (elbow, wye, reducer, cap, etc.), geometry, C-value, and connection ports.

nodes.name: project-file.schema.ts
nodes.summary: Top-level Zod schema for the .sizewise project file format. Envelopes all entity collections, project metadata, settings, and schema version.

nodes.name: ductSizing.ts
nodes.summary: Duct sizing calculator. Implements equal friction and velocity methods for determining optimal duct cross-section given CFM and allowable pressure drop per 100 ft.

nodes.name: pressureDrop.ts
nodes.summary: Pressure drop calculator. Computes friction loss per unit length using Darcy-Weisbach with ASHRAE roughness coefficients, and total system pressure from accumulated segment losses.

nodes.name: ventilation.ts
nodes.summary: Ventilation calculator. Computes room CFM requirements from occupancy or square footage (ASHRAE 62.1), and validates supply vs. return air balance.

nodes.name: DashboardPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Project dashboard main view. Shows recent projects, all projects grid, search/filter controls, and new project creation entry point.

nodes.name: ExportDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Export dialog. Offers export to PDF (drawing + calculations), PNG (canvas snapshot), CSV (BOM data), SVG (vector drawing), and Excel (BOM spreadsheet).

nodes.name: pdfGenerator.ts
nodes.summary: PDF report generator. Produces professional HVAC design reports including title block, drawing snapshot, equipment schedule, duct sizing table, and pressure drop summary.

nodes.name: entityCommands.ts
nodes.summary: Command objects for entity operations. Implements the Command pattern for undo/redo: AddEntity, DeleteEntity, MoveEntity, ResizeEntity, UpdateEntityProperty.

nodes.name: historyStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for undo/redo history. Maintains command stack, executes forward/backward traversal, and exposes undo/redo availability flags.

nodes.name: useCalculations.ts
nodes.summary: React hook bridging entity store changes to the calculation engine. Subscribes to entity mutations and triggers re-calculation of affected duct runs.

nodes.name: useEntityOperations.ts
nodes.summary: React hook encapsulating entity CRUD operations for use in canvas components. Wraps command dispatch with undo/redo support.

nodes.name: useKeyboardShortcuts.ts
nodes.summary: Keyboard shortcut manager hook. Binds global shortcuts: Esc (deselect), Ctrl+Z (undo), Ctrl+Y (redo), Delete (remove), Ctrl+C/V (copy/paste), and tool activations.

nodes.name: useAutoSave.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-save hook. Debounces entity store changes and triggers ProjectStateOrchestrator save after a configurable idle period.

nodes.name: ductBounds.ts
nodes.summary: Duct geometry helpers. Computes bounding boxes, endpoint projections, center points, and perpendicular offsets for rectangular and round duct cross-sections.

nodes.name: magneticConnectionService.ts
nodes.summary: Magnetic snapping service. Detects proximity of duct endpoints or equipment ports during drawing and snaps cursor position to valid connection targets.

nodes.name: constraintValidator.ts
nodes.summary: Engineering constraint validator. Checks all entities against ASHRAE velocity limits, pressure drop thresholds, and dimensional minimums. Produces structured violation reports.

nodes.name: getElementColor.ts
nodes.summary: Visual token system for canvas elements. Maps entity state (normal, selected, hovered, error, warning) and system service type to specific fill/stroke colors.

nodes.name: featureFlags.ts
nodes.summary: Feature flag definitions. Controls progressive feature rollout: 3D view, auto-sizing, BOM costing, cloud backup, and advanced fitting library.

layers.name: UI
layers.description: React components, pages, dialogs, and visual elements. No business logic — purely presentation and event forwarding.

layers.name: Feature
layers.description: Feature-level orchestrators that compose UI and services into user-facing capabilities: canvas designer, dashboard, export.

layers.name: Tool
layers.description: Interactive drawing tools that handle user input events and translate them into entity operations. BaseTool pattern with specialized subclasses.

layers.name: Renderer
layers.description: Konva/Three.js rendering layer. Translates entity state into visual canvas elements. Pure visual — no business logic or state mutation.

layers.name: Service
layers.description: Domain services implementing core business logic: engineering calculations, automation, BOM generation, export, and connection management.

layers.name: Store
layers.description: Zustand state stores. The single source of truth for application state. All stores are reactive and drive UI re-renders.

layers.name: Persistence
layers.description: Storage and serialization layer. Adapters for Tauri native FS, Web File System Access API, and browser storage. Migration system for schema upgrades.

layers.name: Data / Schema
layers.description: Zod schemas defining entity shapes, project file format, and type contracts. Used for runtime validation on save/load and as TypeScript types.

tour.title: App Entry & Routing
tour.description: Start here to understand how the app initializes. layout.tsx is the Next.js root that wraps everything. Two primary routes: /dashboard (project list) and /canvas (designer).

tour.title: State Management Foundation
tour.description: The entire app state flows through Zustand stores. entityStore is the canonical data source for all canvas entities. canvas.store owns the active tool and draw mode. project.store coordinates saves.

tour.title: Canvas Composition
tour.description: CanvasPage.tsx is the main orchestrator. It composes the full workspace. CanvasContainer.tsx owns the Konva stage and dispatches to tools and renderers.

tour.title: Drawing Tools
tour.description: Each draw mode maps to a Tool class. DuctTool handles the core drawing interaction — click to start, move to extend, click to place. FittingTool auto-detects valid insertion points.

tour.title: Engineering Calculations
tour.description: The calculation pipeline: ConnectionGraphBuilder builds the network, FlowPropagationService distributes CFM, PressurePropagationService computes static pressure using engineeringCalculator's ASHRAE algorithms.

tour.title: Rendering Pipeline
tour.description: Renderers are pure visual translators — they read from entity state and draw to Konva/Three.js. DuctRunRenderer composes individual DuctRenderers. FittingRenderer uses SMACNA engineering symbols.

tour.title: Persistence & Storage
tour.description: ProjectStateOrchestrator manages save/load lifecycle. StorageAdapter is the interface with three implementations: Tauri (desktop native), FileSystemAccess (modern browser), WebStorage (fallback). Migration system handles schema upgrades.
